description.zh-Hans: 生成装饰性的精灵表模板，显示带有彩色单元格参考线的网格布局。
description.en: Generates a decorative sprite sheet template showing grid layout with colored cell guides.

triggers.zh-Hans: 精灵表, 精灵图, 精灵表模板, 网格布局
triggers.en: sprite sheet, spritesheet, sprite template, grid layout

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成4x4的精灵表模板，用于规划像素角色动画帧的布局。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a 4x4 sprite sheet template for planning pixel character animation frame layouts.
